name: Suspicious Execution of Powerpoint File in Uncommon Path
description: Detects suspicious execution of PowerPoint Files in uncommon path that is being used for wineloader malware in APT29 Phishing Campaign.

filterSets.name: Suspicious Loading of Unsigned Dll via Powerpoint in Uncommon Path
Suspicious Outbound Connection via Powerpoint File in Uncommon Path
